response.overview: The Song of Noyyal River is an observational documentary filmed entirely on a mobile phone. Through quiet, patient observation, the film traces the rhythms of the Noyyal River and the lives that exist alongside it. Without narration or staged moments, it listens to the landscape, its people, and the sounds that shape their everyday existence, becoming a meditation on memory, place, ecology, and the fragile relationship between humans and the river.
response.title: The Song of Noyyal River
